pages.title: Issue: "Fluids/Energy not supported"
pages.text: $(bold)Status$(): Not yet implemented (MVP limitation)$(br2)$(bold)Workaround$(): Use item-based transport only$(br2)$(bold)Future$(): Fluid/energy support planned for post-MVP

pages.title: Issue: "AE2 integration not working"
pages.text: $(bold)Status$(): Not yet implemented$(br2)$(bold)Workaround$(): Use vanilla chests/hoppers$(br2)$(bold)Future$(): AE2 integration planned for post-MVP

pages.title: Issue: "PreFab-as-Item loses data"
pages.text: $(bold)Status$(): Should be fixed in v0.1.0-alpha$(br2)$(bold)If still occurs$(): $(li)Report bug with reproduction steps $(li)Include NBT data dump$(br2)---
